description: Unstable product color or color loss during processing can be compensated for by using water-soluble dyes that completely eliminate the risk of any physiological hazard. The SOYUZSNAB Group of Companies offers both natural and synthetic dyes from leading global manufacturers for coloring food products, as well as natural and synthetic Esco® dyes produced by NPO Green Lines. The assortment of the SOYUZSNAB Group includes 0.3% fat-soluble beta-carotene suspensions and 10% beta-carotene soluble in cold water. This natural dye and antioxidant has vitamin A activity, an effective preventive agent against oncological and cardiovascular diseases. **Common advantages:** Many of these dyes provide bright, easily reproducible colors at low dosages, have a lower cost than natural dyes, are resistant to heat treatment, and are convenient to use. Some are also neutral in taste and do not cause aftertaste. **Common composition:** Varies by product, but often includes water, various E-numbered colorants (e.g., E160a, E120, E122, E110, E133, E171, E124, E102, E104, E131, E100, E150d), thickeners (E1442, E466), acidity regulators (E330, E331, E525), preservatives (E202, E211), humectants (E422, E1520), carriers (E433), vegetable oil, dextrin, maltodextrin. **Common application areas:** Processed cheese, spreads, butter, sour cream products, curd products, dairy desserts, puddings, creams, cream, flavored milk, milkshakes, fermented milk products, cheeses, condensed milk, rennet products, and dairy whey products.
